title: fNIRS Finger Tapping
description: An example functional near-infrared spectroscopy (fNIRS) dataset formatted according to the Brain Imaging Data Structure (BIDS) specification. The dataset contains motor cortex hemodynamic responses from 5 participants during a finger tapping task, with measurements acquired using a NIRx device. This dataset serves as a reference implementation for fNIRS-BIDS conversion and demonstrates proper data organization and metadata documentation for functional neuroimaging studies.
methods_description: Participants performed a finger tapping task consisting of left thumb-to-finger tapping, right thumb-to-finger tapping, or control conditions, each lasting 5 seconds and cued by an auditory stimulus. fNIRS sensors were positioned over the motor cortex with short channels attached to the scalp. Data were acquired using a NIRx device and converted to BIDS format using MNE-BIDS.
